Description: I chose Dome of the Rock because it is holy and in my heart. I feel natural love and longing to visit it, even though occupation stops us.
I chose the Eiffel Tower because it’s iconic and full of charm. The lights at night make me feel excited to explore.
I chose Cappadocia because the hot air balloons at sunrise look magical. I dream of being there, feeling free in the sky.
I chose Sydney because it feels alive and full of energy. The mix of water, buildings, and landmarks makes me want to discover more.
I chose Verona because it feels full of history and soul. The river and sunset make me imagine quiet walks and old stories.
I chose Dubai Miracle Garden because it looks like a fairytale. The flower houses and colors are creative and peaceful.
I chose the Maldives because the sea and wooden path make me feel calm. It looks like the perfect escape to rest and breathe.
I chose Hallstatt because it looks peaceful and quiet. The lake and mountains make me feel like I’m in a storybook.
I chose Peterhof Palace because it looks royal and full of history. The fountains and gold statues make me feel amazed.
I chose the Louvre Museum because it mixes history and art. The sunset and quiet view make me feel calm and inspired.
